summary: RBAC Permission Testing Complete - All 25 tests passed. Verified role-based access control across all backend routes including events, championships, team members, attendance, convocations, and lineups.

admin_full_access.description: Admin has full access to all endpoints - championships, events, teams, members, attendance, lineups

tests: Player can view events but NOT create/edit/delete them
Player can view championships but NOT create/edit/delete them
Player can view team members but NOT manage them

player_attendance.description: Player can update their own attendance status

staff_team_scoped_access.description: Staff (treinador/delegado) can create events for their assigned teams

team_access_restriction.description: Staff/players cannot access teams they are not assigned to

permissions_endpoint.description: GET /api/auth/permissions returns correct permissions for each role

convocation_creation.description: Convocations creation requires staff role - players get 403

lineup_management.description: Line-up management requires coach permissions - players get 403

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation is comprehensive with 117 permission checks throughout server.py
PermissionChecker class in permissions.py provides clean abstraction for role-based checks
All routes properly use get_permission_checker() to validate access
Team-scoped access is correctly enforced via can_access_team() method
seed_data_creation: Created test staff users during testing for staff event creation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC implementation fully tested and working. All roles (admin, treinador, delegado, jogador, responsavel) have correct permissions enforced. Key endpoints tested: /api/auth/permissions, /api/events, /api/championships, /api/teams/{id}/members, /api/convocations, /api/championships/matches/{id}/lineup, /api/attendance/{id}. Players correctly get 403 Forbidden when trying to create/edit/delete resources they don't have permission for.

test_categories: TestTeamMemberRBAC (3 tests) - Team member management permissions
TestStaffEventCreation (1 test) - Staff can create events for assigned teams
